title: Problems with RLIMIT_* resources
body:
### Issue Description

watchtower fails to create new container with error:

```Apr 06 01:23:36 ubuntu-s-1vcpu-1gb-lon1-01 conmon[25768]: time="2023-04-05T22:23:36Z" level=info msg="Session done" Failed=0 Scanned=1 Updated=0 notify=no
Apr 06 01:23:36 ubuntu-s-1vcpu-1gb-lon1-01 conmon[25768]: time="2023-04-05T22:23:36Z" level=error msg="Error response from daemon: fill out specgen: ulimit option \"RLIMIT_NOFILE=1048576:1048576\" requires name=SOFT:HARD, failed to be parsed: invalid ulimit type: RLIMIT_NOFILE"
Apr 06 01:23:36 ubuntu-s-1vcpu-1gb-lon1-01 podman[27038]: @ - - [06/Apr/2023:01:23:36 +0300] "POST /v1.25/containers/create?name=%2Fshadowbox HTTP/1.1" 500 221 "" "Go-http-client/1.1"
Apr 06 01:23:36 ubuntu-s-1vcpu-1gb-lon1-01 podman[27038]: time="2023-04-06T01:23:36+03:00" level=info msg="Request Failed(Internal Server Error): fill out specgen: ulimit option \"RLIMIT_NOFILE=1048576:1048576\" requires name=SOFT:HARD, failed to be parsed: invalid ulimit type: RLIMIT_NOFILE"
Apr 06 01:23:36 ubuntu-s-1vcpu-1gb-lon1-01 conmon[25768]: time="2023-04-05T22:23:36Z" level=info msg="Creating /shadowbox"```

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Create outline instance with following script https://gist.github.com/xpahos/2801ae546ac00d2e269396188195d692

### Describe the results you received

```
 ulimit option \"RLIMIT_NOFILE=1048576:1048576\" requires name=SOFT:HARD, failed to be parsed: invalid ulimit type: RLIMIT_NOFILE"
```

problems with parsing resources

### Describe the results you expected

normal parsing
